ref: If my father touches me and realizes I am trying to trick him, he will put a curse on me instead of giving me a blessing.”
text: Annea a, né me baba afa ye sa wafofa me nwo wanea. Na ɔkɔyɛ ye nye so kyɛ mebaalakalaka ye. Sɛ ɔba ye sɔ a, ɛnomalɛ mmom yeɛ ngɔtwetwe ngɔwa me so ɔ, nna saleɛ ɔ.”
translated: If you don't listen to your parents, you will not have a good life. When you are on your own and things are not going well with you, do not say that.

ref: Jacob also noticed that Laban was not as friendly as he had been before.

ref: We were out in the field, tying up bundles of wheat. Suddenly my bundle stood up, and your bundles gathered around and bowed down to it.”
text: “Né yɛkyekye ɛmo tire tire wɔ fieso, na mvum nu, me mo tire bɔ makyekye ne dwɔsole gyinane kyirebeinn, na ɛmɔ mo tire deɛ nemɔ pɛle me deɛ ne anwo beyiale, na bɛkotole ye.”
translated: Don't stay at home idle, work, and do not be lazy, and do not say that you are tired, because if you are tired, then you will be poor, and poverty brings about all kind of problems.

ref: Joseph's brothers killed a goat and dipped Joseph's fancy coat in its blood.
